summary: Iteration 83: Myths & Legends Database - All features tested and working. Backend APIs (civilizations, myths by civ, generate, narrate, search) all pass. Frontend tabs, civilization cards, myth cards, search, and detail views all functional. Fixed LlmChat initialization bug in myth generation endpoint.
seed_data_creation: One myth generated during testing: 'Orpheus and Eurydice' for Greek civilization
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 83 tests Myths & Legends feature expansion. All backend endpoints working: GET /api/myths/civilizations (returns 20 civilizations with myth counts), GET /api/myths/{civ_id} (returns myths for civilization), POST /api/myths/{civ_id}/generate (AI myth generation, requires auth), POST /api/myths/{myth_id}/narrate (TTS for generated myths), GET /api/myths/search/{query} (cross-civilization search). GET /api/creation-stories still returns 15 stories. Frontend has dual tabs: 'Creation Stories' (15 stories with region filters) and 'Myths & Legends' (20 civilization cards). Clicking civilization shows myth list with 'Tap to generate with AI' for ungenerated myths. Generated myths show full detail with characters, story, lesson, symbols, and narrator. Search works across all civilizations.

backend_apis: GET /api/myths/civilizations - returns 20 civilizations with myth_count and myths_preview
GET /api/myths/{civ_id} - returns civilization info and myths list (generated + seeds)
POST /api/myths/{civ_id}/generate - generates myth via AI and stores in DB
GET /api/myths/search/{query} - searches across civilizations and seed titles
GET /api/creation-stories - still returns 15 creation stories with regions
frontend_ui: Tab bar with 'Creation Stories' (15) and 'Myths & Legends' (120) tabs
Creation Stories tab shows 15 story cards with region filters
Story detail panel with narrator and 'Watch AI Cinematic Experience' button
Myths & Legends tab shows 20 civilization cards
Civilization cards show name, region, myth count, and preview titles
Clicking civilization shows myth list with generated/ungenerated status
Ungenerated myths show 'Tap to generate with AI' prompt
Generated myths show full detail with characters, story, lesson, symbols
Myth detail has 'Listen to Story' narrator component
Search input searches across all civilizations
Search results show myth title, civilization, and generated status

bug_fixed.issue: LlmChat initialization error in myth generation endpoint
bug_fixed.root_cause: LlmChat was called with invalid 'model' parameter
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use session_id and system_message parameters instead
